vulnerability.title: Install usbguard Package
vulnerability.description: The usbguard package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install usbguard
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if ( ! ( grep -sqE "^.*\.s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/osrelease || grep -sqE "^s390x$" /proc/sys/kernel/arch; ) && rpm --quiet -q kernel-core ); then if ! rpm -q --quiet "usbguard" ; then dnf install -y "usbguard" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: Installing the usbguard package is a standard package installation that does not affect authentication, networking, or filesystem configuration, and is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage.
